nasb.text: But David said to Abishai, “Do not destroy him, for who can stretch out his hand against the Lord’s anointed and be without guilt?”

esv.text: But David said to Abishai, “Do not destroy him, for who can put out his hand against the Lord’s anointed and be guiltless?”

cnv.text: 大衛卻對亞比篩說：“不可殺死他，因為有誰伸手傷害耶和華的受膏者而無罪呢？”

ccb.text: 大卫却说：“不要杀他，谁杀害耶和华所膏立的王，都难逃罪责。
